items.title: Dairy Supply & Distribution
items.excerpt: Reliable procurement and distribution of dairy supplies and products with structured reporting.
items.details: We support cooperative supply chains with procurement planning, distribution logistics, and partner reporting aligned to international standards.

items.title: Cooperative Capacity Support
items.excerpt: Operational advisory, farmer aggregation, and record-keeping support for cooperative growth.
items.details: We help cooperatives improve governance, quality control, and performance tracking with practical tools and templates.

items.title: Transport & Cold-Chain Logistics
items.excerpt: Structured transport support and cold-chain readiness for milk handling and distribution.
items.details: Fleet coordination, route planning, and handling protocols tailored for dairy operations and compliance.

items.title: Dairy Products Investment Advisory
items.excerpt: Investor-ready opportunities with expansion planning and risk management support.
items.details: We prepare investment narratives, growth models (placeholders), and partnership structures for scalable impact.

items.title: Animal Health Consultations
items.excerpt: General dairy and animal health consultations for productivity and welfare outcomes.
items.details: Guidance on husbandry, feeding basics, disease prevention practices, and referral pathways (non-emergency).
